question: What are the ids and names of the battles that led to more than 10 people killed in total.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.caused_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING sum(T3.killed)  >  10
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_1, T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T2.col_2 = T3.col_1 GROUP BY T1.col_1 HAVING SUM(T3.col_5) > 10
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_1, T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_1 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T2.col_2 = T3.col_1 GROUP BY T1.col_1 HAVING SUM(T3.col_5) > 10
